human_verification.method: Manual review against issue #103, queue row 98, repository templates, and the delivery contract.

specialist_owned_sections: ML-operations specialty boundary and adjacent-specialty rejection rules
MLOps-specific scenarios for promotion, deployment, monitoring, rollback, and recovery
fallback behavior for stale or unavailable delegated outputs
market_ready_claim_support: Complete package exists at the issue-specified catalog path.
Authority sources are real public sources with review dates, refresh intervals, and decay policy.
Evaluation results meet the 0.90 minimum pass-rate threshold with no unreviewed regressions.
Deployment and marketing artifacts document runtime, isolation, rollback, monitoring, logging, buyer profile, subscription model, proof points, and GTM gaps.

notes: The package remains narrower than applied-ai-solution-specialist by focusing on operationalization and release controls rather than model design.
Adjacent product strategy, general software engineering, and unrelated infrastructure specialties are explicitly rejected in the manifest.
Shared meta-agent use is contract-defined and safe to defer on demand with specialist-owned fallback behavior.
